# ThesisDocx Machine Report Contract

Source: `schemas/report-contract.schema.json`

Schema ID: `https://thesisdocx.local/schemas/report-contract.schema.json`

Common additive contract for CLI/Core reports that expose root reportVersion.

## Root

Type: `anyOf(ServiceResult | RenderResult | DiagnosticReport | TemplateGateReport | TemplateAuthoringReport | RequirementMappingReport | PrivacyGuardResult | DocxStructureDiffResult | DocxLayoutSignature | LayoutSignatureCompareResult | NegativeFixtureRunResult | OnboardingPackageValidationResult)`

Required fields: none

| `kind` | string | yes |  |  |
